response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong engineering fundamentals with 20 years of experience, multiple languages, and proven ability to architect systems, the resume shows no evidence of experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, metrics/telemetry systems, or data-driven growth work. These are core to the Principal role's responsibility to "architect standardized experimentation frameworks" and "partner with Data Science teams." The candidate would require substantial domain ramp-up on the key 40% of the job.
strengths: Deep technical breadth across multiple languages and domains, consistently shipping production systems at scale
Proven platform architecture and design capability—GISCollective, microservices at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/second, infrastructure work
Strong mentorship and knowledge-sharing track record—workshops, courses, refactoring dojos, open-source contributions
concerns: No demonstrable experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing systems, or feature-flagging infrastructure—central to this role
Metrics, telemetry, statistical analysis, and data aptitude not evident in any position or project—required expertise
No evidence of high-availability, multi-region, globally distributed systems or growth/experimentation team leadership

key_factors.factor: Proven systemic platform design and technical leadership
